description_long: This is a structured, rectangular Gucci handbag in a light gray color, featuring a prominent embossed GUCCI logo and emblem on the front panel. The bag has two sturdy, flat handles for hand carrying and a detachable, adjustable long strap for shoulder or crossbody wear. The exterior is smooth and matte, with minimal decorative hardware except for small metallic attachments at the handle bases. The top of the bag appears to close with a zipper, ensuring secure storage of personal items. The overall design is sleek and modern, with clean lines and a solid, unpatterned surface. The back of the bag is plain, and the sides are slightly tapered, giving it a refined silhouette.
description: A light gray, structured Gucci handbag with an embossed logo, dual handles, and a detachable long strap. The design is sleek, modern, and minimally decorated.
description_view_0: Front view showing the embossed GUCCI logo and emblem, dual handles, and the attachment points for the long strap.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bag's tapered profile, the thickness of the handles, and the way the long strap attaches to the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned back panel and the full length of the long strap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the bag's depth and the arrangement of the handles and strap.
attribute_brand_logo: Embossed GUCCI logo and double G emblem on the front panel, centrally located and raised from the surface.
attribute_strap_type: Two short, flat handles for hand carrying and one long, adjustable, detachable strap for shoulder or crossbody use, attached with metal clasps.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Top zipper closure running the full length of the bag, providing secure access to the main compartment.
attribute_decorative_elements: Small metallic hardware at handle bases; otherwise, minimal decoration.
